configurePresets.name: unix-host-debug
configurePresets.description: This configuration sets the host Unix debug build environment

configurePresets.name: unix-host-static-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Enables static C++ libraries for host Unix Debug
configurePresets.description: This enables static C++ libraries for host Unix Debug

configurePresets.name: unix-host-shared-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Enables shared C++ libraries for host Unix Debug
configurePresets.description: This enables shared C++ libraries for host Unix Debug

configurePresets.name: unix-host-tests-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Enables unit tests for host Unix Debug
configurePresets.description: This enables unit tests for host Unix Debug

configurePresets.name: unix-host-cpp-examples-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Enables C++ examples for host Unix Debug
configurePresets.description: This enables C++ examples for host Unix Debug

configurePresets.name: unix-host-python2-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python2 bindings for host Unix Debug
configurePresets.description: This enables Python2 bindings for host Unix Debug

configurePresets.name: unix-host-python3-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python3 bindings for host Unix Debug
configurePresets.description: This enables Python3 bindings for host Unix Debug

configurePresets.name: unix-host-static-all-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Enables all project options with static C++ library configurations for host Unix Debug
configurePresets.description: This enables all project options with static C++ library configurations for host Unix Debug
